attacking_style: Early-stage attacks designed for team service rather than personal glory, willing to probe opportunistically but not characteristic of late, decisive moves. Shows maturity to abandon losing efforts.
team_tactics: Classic domestique role: launches early attacks to soften fields before team leaders move. Coordinates with fellow domestiques (Masnada) in staged team setups to control race rhythm.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine clear terrain preference, though appears in breakaways on varied terrain including climbs and transitional stages.
vulnerability: Breakaway cooperation and negotiation—documented conflict with Bennett cost him a stage win opportunity. Can be caught between team duty and personal ambition.
key_patterns: Team-first attacking: early moves to set up leaders, not personal GC (2 instances)
Tactical intelligence: recognizes losing situations, drops back to rejoin favorable groups (2 instances)
Breakaway miscommunication: inter-rider conflict during crucial moments compromises results (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: Recent 2022 observation shows tactical maturity improving, but limited performance data prevents trajectory assessment
